changes.parsing: Added app elapsed extraction precedence and status-based fallback reasons; added optional source/reason metadata
changes.summarization: Normalized status values to queued/running/completed/failed/stopped in summarizeRealBackendRunSnapshot
changes.polling: Kept polling until completed/failed/stopped and updated start handling for queued/non-running start responses
changes.ui: Updated client/nginx/app/db breakdown row rendering with conditional display and explicit app elapsed fallback text
changes.tests: Added unit tests for extraction and status normalization, and Playwright assertion updates

validations: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/admin-load-test-dashboard.spec.ts --workers=1
risks: Payload schema variation may leave nginx/app elapsed values unavailable and render fallback text
Start response status semantics are interpreted via string matching only
recommendation: Merge and follow up with backend payload fixture coverage for app elapsed and queued state transitions
